title: garcinia indica
intro: Garcinia indica is a plant species native to India, belonging to the family Clusiaceae, also known as the mangosteen family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Garcinia indica is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory disorders, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved gut health, and enhanced immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as an herbal decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is also used as a flavoring agent in various food products.
